character_polynomial_certificate.shifted_correlation: E_g[chi_xi(g) chi_xi(g tau) chi_W(g c)] for tau=(1 2), c=(1 2 3)

claim_gate.reason: The exact first power trace is proved. Three additional power traces, Newton reconstruction, root separation, complete sector coverage, coherent synthesis, and decoding remain open.

equality_pattern_certificate.method: Selected falling-factorial cycles impose a partial bijection on g. A canonical equality pattern with k generic labels and r constraints contributes (n-3)_k/(n)_r, divided by cycle rotations.

falsifiers_triggered: The trace identity alone does not determine a multiplicity-four characteristic polynomial.
A characteristic polynomial still needs an all-n normalized root-separation theorem.
One stable channel does not cover every Racah sector required by a decoder.
No coherent circuit or hidden-involution decoder follows from the trace calculation.
summary: Proved the cubic stable-channel trace for every n>=7 by exact falling-cycle equality patterns plus an exact S_7 endpoint character sum; the full quartic and gap theorem remain open.

theorem.statement: The second-stage support-intersection-two orbit Hamiltonian has trace 4n^3-46n^2+149n-118 on Hom_Sn(V_xi,V_xi tensor V_W).
